FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Geopolitical risk from Iran lifts safe-haven USD
UK economic slump reinforces dollar strength
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY bullish on Iran tensions, UK slowdown; buy MA20 dip with tight stops.
FX.comment: Bullish bias driven by geopolitical risk and yield differentials, with technical support at MA20

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] DOWN: Technical Weakness Amid Oil Shock and Earnings Drag
tldr_points: Oil above $100 weighing on equities, Nvidia earnings disappoint
Geopolitical risk in Persian Gulf adds to risk-off sentiment
Technical breakdown below MA20 with RSI weakening suggests further downside
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 faces downside pressure as oil spikes, earnings miss and geopolitical risks undermine risk appetite.
STOCKS.comment: Technical breakdown below MA20 with bearish macro backdrop supports further downside.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: Regulatory Headwinds Intensify as Law Enforcement Targets Crypto Ecosystem
tldr_points: Regulatory crackdown accelerates with AG lawsuits and cartel sanctions
Kidnapping targeting crypto executive signals heightened security risks
Weakness in altcoin/rollup sector suggests broader crypto risk-off
CRYPTO.excerpt: Regulatory escalation and security threats pressure BTC as market faces structural headwinds
CRYPTO.comment: Regulatory headwinds and security risks create unfavorable risk-reward for long positions
